title: SOE Privatisation and Divestiture Programme 2024-2027
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Directs IDC to develop and implement a structured privatisation and divestiture programme for non-strategic portfolio companies, targeting proceeds of ZMW 2.5 billion over the 2024-2027 period to reduce GRZ fiscal burden.
notes: IDC has identified 5 candidate companies for divestiture. Transaction advisors appointed for 2 companies. Political economy constraints delaying progress on 3 others.

title: Enhanced SOE Financial Reporting and Dividend Policy
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Requires all SOEs to submit quarterly financial performance reports to the Ministry within 30 days of quarter end. Establishes minimum dividend payout ratio of 30% of after-tax profit for profitable SOEs. Introduces consolidated SOE fiscal risk dashboard.
notes: All SOEs have submitted Q3 2024 reports on time. Dividend policy being implemented for FY2024 final dividends.

title: ZCCM-IH Mine Rehabilitation Fund Adequacy Review
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Directs ZCCM-IH to commission an independent actuarial review of mine rehabilitation closure cost estimates and ensure the rehabilitation fund is maintained at a minimum of 105% of current cost estimates.
notes: Independent actuarial review commissioned. Preliminary findings indicate fund shortfall of approximately ZMW 570 million. ZCCM-IH developing top-up plan.

title: Zambia Railways Emergency Capital Support and Turnaround Conditions
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Approves emergency capital injection of ZMW 800 million to Zambia Railways for track rehabilitation and locomotive maintenance, subject to quarterly performance milestones on service reliability, revenue recovery, and governance improvements.
notes: First tranche of ZMW 200 million disbursed February 2025. Q1 2025 milestone review scheduled for April 2025.

title: ZANACO KYC Remediation and AML/CFT Compliance
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Directs ZANACO to implement a comprehensive KYC remediation programme and strengthen AML/CFT controls in line with BoZ Directive BoZ-DIR-2024-003. Ministry to receive quarterly compliance progress reports.
notes: ZANACO has completed Phase 1 KYC remediation. BoZ re-examination passed March 2024. Phase 2 (enhanced due diligence for PEPs) on track.

title: Zambia Gold Company — Artisanal Mining Formalisation Targets
issuedBy: Ministry of Finance and National Planning
description: Sets annual gold procurement targets for Zambia Gold Company from artisanal and small-scale miners, requiring a minimum 20% year-on-year increase in formalised ASM gold volumes through 2026.
notes: FY2024 ASM procurement increased by 18% vs FY2023, slightly below the 20% target. New buying centres opened in North-Western and Muchinga provinces.
